title: Singer Kate Ceberano reveals shock at deepfake artificial intelligence post showing her crying about late friend Sam Neill
description: ’You were tricked and I kinda think this is just the beginning.’
content:
ARIA Hall of Fame inductee Kate Ceberano “nearly threw up” after coming across a deepfake post showing her mourning the death of late actor Sam Neill.

title: Uncovering multidimensional effects of generative AI on learning
description: A research team consisting of researcher Somi Joo, Professor Changjun Lee and Professor Daeho Lee from the Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU) Department of Artificial Intelligence Convergence have published a study comprehensively analyzing the opportunities and risks of using generative artificial intelligence (GAI) in educational settings. The study examines how students have recently used generative AI in education.

title: OpenAI Says Its AI Caused Hugging Face Cyber Breach (1)
description: OpenAI said its artificial intelligence models were able to compromise the internal systems of startup Hugging Face Inc., offering an early glimpse of how AI systems could fuel new cybersecurity threats.
content:

title: Super Micro surges on new order disclosure after SpaceX announcement
description: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.
content:
Shares of Super Micro Computer jumped 15% after the server maker said Tuesday it now sees higher margins than previously projected for the June quarter, with a surge in new orders.

title: Human eyes needed, not AI, to study the Arctic sky
description: Scientists studying space weather are turning to human volunteers rather than artificial intelligence to help sort through hundreds of thousands of images of the Arctic sky. The Clear Skies—Kiruna project is asking members of the public to look at pictures of the sky above Kiruna, Sweden, and say whether it is clear or cloudy. Volunteers need no experience to get involved.

title: Glenmark sees innovative products driving 70% revenue in 5-6 years: CMD Glenn Saldanha
description: Glenmark anticipates innovative products will drive nearly seventy percent of its revenue. This strategic shift moves the company away from its traditional generics-led model. The company is developing next-generation products targeting oncology and other complex diseases. Glenmark aims to become a global powerhouse in oncology within ten years. Artificial intelligence will significantly accelerate drug discovery and development processes.

title: Artificial intelligence company Firmus plans to use state
description: Data centre builder Firmus Technologies posts to its website a statement, since removed, indicating its intention to get some of its cooling water from the state-owned irrigation system, adding "but we do not want to highlight this yet, as they are yet to agree".
content:

title: State AI deepfake laws face first big test in 2026 midterm elections
description: The midterm elections represent the first major test of a raft of state laws recently passed to police the use of artificial intelligence in campaign materials.
content:

title: This Former Intel CEO Wants to Jumpstart Moore’s Law With Light
description: Pat Gelsinger wants to pave the way to ever more powerful artificial intelligence using tiny beams of light.
content:
